name: Eunice Sloan
motto: "The sunlight of truth sits upon her forehead and in her eye and the heart of man is finding an inheritance that the soul counts itself to be her voice only."
description: We are not quite sure whether Eunice will sing her way to fame or "work" her way to happiness. At any rate we are quite sure she'll be successful.

name: D. O. Carlisle
motto: "Thine's a friend modesty in merit."
description: D. O. is a seemingly quiet and retiring fellow but he always forges ahead. He is a splendid example of the old proverb that "still waters run deepest."

name: Gladys Carol Watlington
motto: "Of the harmonies of form and feature, and the soul displayed in that bright creature."
description: Gladys is truly a person of charming personality. She can assume dignity at will and often to the utter inhibition of Freshmen and others.

name: GUSSIE MAE BRASFIELD
motto: "Her step is music and her voice is song."
description: Gussie Mae's dramatic ability has won much favorable comment. She has been the "leading lady" for two Senior plays. Gus is somewhat of a heart breaker and sh!! she certainly can "trip the light fantastic."

name: JAMES JEFFERSON BELL
motto: "Let us not break with him, for he will never follow anything that other men begin."
description: Jeff's most notable characteristics are initiative and "pep." He is such a "Jack-at-all-trades" that it is difficult to keep up with him, but he is generally far in the lead.

name: NENA HARRIS
motto: "What more than mirth would mortals have The cheerful man's a king."
description: Nena is one of the few people who can tell a joke without marring it. She also attained quite a bit of fame as an inventor of jokes and a French literature collaborator.

name: Ruth Alexander
motto: "She is pretty to walk with and witty to talk with and pleasant, too, to think on."
description: One can always count on Ruth to cap every remark with a really clever and witty retort. Her constant cheerfulness and diligence are most refreshing.

name: J. C. Babcock
motto: "A man he seems of cheerful yesterdays and confident tomorrows."
description: Babcock is one of those quiet, cheerful fellows upon whom one can always count to do the right thing at the right time.

name: Mamie Ethel Burton
motto: "A fine character is the genuine tranquil mind rather than among the brilliant spirits."
description: Ethel is a likable girl with a pleasing way. She says little and thinks much. Ethel is a steady, hard worker who never seeks praise for what she does.

name: Bertha Irene Bates
motto: "An inward sincerity will influence the outward deportment."
description: Bertha is quiet and sweet, never says much (except—well?). She loves "Fish" and "Fish" love her.

name: Lawler F. Watson
motto: "The dignity of man into your hands is given, oh, keep it well, with you it sinks or lifts itself to heaven."
description: "Wat" is at once a poet, a scientist, a farmer, a professor, and, above all, a perfect gentleman. No matter what he undertakes he will be successful, famous and dignified.

name: Ruby Catherine Barton
motto: "Her looks discourse eloquence with modesty."
description: Ruby is an all round girl—a musician of promise, a fine student, an excellent athlete and a womanly woman. She always "passes" her courses, no matter of what nature they may be.

name: Sumter Lea III
motto: "Light of heart and fancy free."
description: Sumter is inordinately proud of two things—the Roman three which suffixes his name and the fact that he is at last beginning to learn how to spell. He is an accomplished artist, a cheerful fellow, and a general favorite.

name: Lydia Williams
motto: "Strongest minds are often those of whom the noisy world hears least."
description: Lydia came to us in her senior year, but not too late to establish herself firmly in the minds and hearts of her classmates. She is an earnest worker, a cheerful companion, and an all round athlete.

name: Claude E. Matthews
motto: "Poets are all who love—who feel great truths and tell them."
description: "Matty" is of the matinee idol type—curly black hair and all that. His thoughts have a philosophical turn and his tennis racket a dangerous twist. "Matty" believes in "rhyme and reason."

name: Clarence D. Cox
motto: "Nothing that's plain but may be witty, if thou hast the vein."
description: Clarence always insists on two things—being in love with a pretty girl and never oh never, omitting the D in his initials. He is the greatest "Cheer Leader" Howard has yet produced and is universally liked.

name: Gladys Falkner
motto: "The world must have great minds even as great spheres suns."
description: Gladys is indeed the sun of all those mortals who inhabit the Latin sphere darkened by dreaded D'Ooge and bewailed Bennett. She is destined and foreordained to become a great Latin scholar and teacher. But her most outstanding characteristic is her gentle modesty and sweetness.

name: E. E. Cox
motto: "Knowledge is power."
clubs: Winner, "A. D. Smith Medal For Mathematics" '19-'20
Howard Representative in Debate with Oklahoma Baptist University '22
Student Advisor to Faculty from Y. M. C. A. Council
description: Mr. Cox is the most popular man on the campus at exam time, for he has an uncanny ability of making students understand Mathematics. He coaches scores of math. students. Mr. Cox receives A's to an amazing extent.

name: Mattie Bean Ouzts
motto: "Haste thee Nymph, and bring with thee jest, and youthful jollity."
description: Mattie Bean is known everywhere for her constant smile and good humor. She will, perhaps challenge Terpsichore for her right to fame as the years roll by.

name: I. N. Patterson
motto: "The life's well-spent—its reward from Heaven only from the stories of this changeful world."
clubs: Vice-President Alabama Baptist Student Missionary Association '20-'21
description: "Pat" is one of the most brilliant students Howard has yet produced. He quotes Shakespeare by the yard and has eloquence such as would make Cicero turn over in his grave to search for his laurels. Our greatest wonder is—How does Pat manage to keep a straight face while preaching?

name: Florence Pass
motto: "Many ways win the esteem of few, some."
clubs: Maid of Honor, Oratorical Debate, Howard-Birmingham Southern '19
description: Florence's talent runs along dramatic lines. She has a large expression class of her own. When we ask Florence to do something, we rest easy for we know it will be done.

name: J. Ford Robinson
motto: "The river of thought flows deepest and strikes surely."
description: "Flivver" is the living example of "little but loud." He can say more to the square inch than anyone else on the campus. As a history "shark" Ford can't be beat.

name: Edna Pate
motto: "Modesty is her charm."
description: Edna is a girl upon whom one can always rely. She is an excellent student and the epitome of neatness and style. She is also famous for her charming blushes.

name: William Gregory Smith
motto: "Good breeding carries along with it a dignity that is respected by the most petulant."
clubs: Second Place in Public Speaking Medal Contest '20-'21
description: Billie is one of these folks one hates to argue with 'cause he has a way of making you see his side. He has quite a reputation as a debater and is a convincing speaker. In track events Billie shines forth. He can even outrun the Tidewater car.

name: John Edmund Brewton
motto: "To write well is at once to think well, to feel rightly and to render properly; it is to have, at the same time, mind, soul, taste."
clubs: Winner, Phi Kappa Nu Scholarship Medal, First Quarter '21-'22
description: John is the literary light of Howard College. He has already achieved success and fame with his pen. He not only excels in his chosen field but in many others as well.

name: Annie Loucassia Boyett
motto: "Distinction is the consequence, never the object, of a great mind."
description: Annie is a faithful and persistent worker and student. She has won distinction as a writer, as well.

name: Franklin O. Carlisle
motto: "He always had a smile That made him quite worthwhile."
description: Frank is a heartbreaker as well as a student. Everybody likes him.

name: ALFORD, O. T.
description: Awarded Loving Cup as best all-round athlete, '21.

name: COWART, BURNETT C.
clubs: Secretary and Treasurer, Philomathic Literary Society, '21-'22

name: Robert W. Herring
clubs: Howard Representative for Rhodes Scholarship award

name: BRADY R. JUSTICE
clubs: President Baptist Student Missionary Movement of Alabama, '21-'22
President Howard B. C. U. Club, '21-'22

name: R. E. LAMBERT, JR.
clubs: President, Philomathic Literary Society, Fall of '21

name: H. D. THOMAS
clubs: Vice President, Y. M. C. A. '21-'22

name: R. B. SIMS
clubs: Director and Business Manager, Glee Club '20-'21

name: Nelson A. Willis
clubs: Debater, Triangular Debate, Howard vs. Mercer

name: J. JONES STEWART
clubs: Business Manager Y. M. C. A.

name: W. R. Willingham
clubs: Howard College Y. M. C. A.
